title: Weekly Market Report | Jun 1–5, 2026
report:
## Japan Equity Markets — Weekly Overview

The Nikkei 225 moved **+1,371 pts (+2.2%)** this week (62,847 → 64,218).

The average return across all 67 themes was **+4.3%**.

---

## 📅 Key Events & News This Week

- SpaceX files for Nasdaq IPO at ~$1.5T valuation → semiconductor/space stocks surge
- US May payrolls: +185K (slightly below +195K consensus)
- ECB cuts rates 0.25% (2nd consecutive cut) → European equities rally
- Kioxia Holdings: first-ever Y60,000/share (NAND demand upgrade)

---

**🥇 AI半導体: +14.8%**
  → AI and semiconductor capital inflows remain strong.

**🥈 MLCC・電子部品: +12.3%**
  → AI and semiconductor capital inflows remain strong.

**🥉 半導体製造装置: +10.7%**
  → Major constituent stocks rallied.

  → Major constituent stocks rallied.

**5️⃣ 次世代半導体: +8.4%**
  → Major constituent stocks rallied.
